item.title: Six dead in Ukraine shooting after gunman opens fire and takes hostages in Kyiv supermarket
item.description: The shooter, a 58-year-old man born in Moscow, is also dead.

item.title: 7NEWS Kiss and Kill: The stunning percentage of ‘human predators’ who walk among us
item.description: ‘They see themselves as superior because they don’t experience fear.’

item.title: Liam Bartlett: Australia’s energy security has been sacrificed on altar of green politics amid Middle East war
item.description: OPINION: The myopic green dream of Energy Minister Chris Bowen and his co-cabinet ideologues has left us all exposed.

item.title: Jim Chalmers to target intergenerational wealth and NDIS affordability in federal budget
item.description: The treasurer has pointed to reforms in the tax system and housing market to level the playing field.

item.title: One Nation suffers kick to popularity as polling numbers puts Coalition back in second place
item.description: Two opinion polls show the party slipping from its recent highs.

item.title: Heartbreak as three-legged dog Pixel returned to shelter after just one night
item.description: The RSPCA is appealing to the public to make informed decisions after three-legged dog Pixel, who had been at a shelter for 145 days, was returned just one day after adoption.

item.title: Deadly mushrooms spreading across backyards as weather cools down
item.description: ‘It potentially can cause death if ingested.’

item.title: FutureBall: Double the luck for Aussie punters with launch of ‘most winnable lottery’
item.description: Aussies will be celebrating the launch of a new Lotto game that promises a fresh twist and better odds of bagging a life-changing win.

item.title: Japan earthquake: Tsunami warning issued after 7.7-magnitude shock off northeast coast
item.description: Tsunami warnings are in place and authorities have urged people to seek higher ground.

item.description: It is no secret Sydney is the most expensive city in the country to buy a home. These are the top areas for first homebuyers.

item.description: ‘This is literally dessert in a pouch’.

item.description: The tenuous ceasefire is due to expire in less than two days.

item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.description: Dozens of shots were reportedly fired as people ran for their lives.

item.description: The fallout to the Zak Butters umpire abuse saga has taken an ‘ironic’ twist.

item.title: Cash making a comeback as Aussies turn to notes and coins for range of transactions
item.description: How often Aussies use physical currency might surprise you.

item.title: Electoral Commission of South Australia braced for damning independent review
item.description: The watchdog is under pressure after missing votes, tech failures and booths opening late.

item.title: Man dies after e-bike crash with bus in Perth as legislation change touted across Australia
item.description: The tragedy occurred weeks after the WA government called for ‘urgent national reform’ on e-bikes.

item.title: Questions about singer D4vd’s song lyrics after he was charged with murder in death of teen girl
item.description: The victim’s decomposed body was found in the trunk of a Tesla registered to the 21-year-old.

item.title: IGA trials ‘Community Check-In’ lane in Sydney to bring back human interaction at the register
item.description: ‘We noticed many shoppers were actively choosing the staffed checkouts.’

item.title: Fresh details emerge after veteran shot dead eight children in Louisiana
item.description: Police have aired what they believe sparked the tragedy.

item.title: I wrote about being rejected from Meghan Markle’s Sydney retreat. The internet response was exactly what you’d expect
item.description: The online response reveals just how quickly ‘empowerment’ can turn into something else.

item.description: The commission says the ‘operational’ issues have not affected the integrity of the state election.

item.description: ‘This is awful news.’

item.title: The Osmonds star Alan Osmond dies aged 76 after battle with multiple sclerosis
item.description: ‘His positive outlook was an inspiration to many.’

item.title: Geelong small forward Tyson Stengle’s AFL future in serious doubt
item.description: A medical model is preventing him from playing and he ‘simply isn’t talking to people closest to him’.

item.description: Industry heavyweights have all privately admitted the same thing.

item.title: Australian cash usage on the rise, RBA survey shows ahead of Cash Out Day
item.description: Physical currency was supposed to be on the way out but a new survey tells a different story.

item.title: Michael movie review: Even divorced from his complicated legacy, the Michael Jackson biopic is unwatchable
item.description: Even divorced from the late singer’s complicated legacy, this listless slog is not worthy of yours or anyone’s time.

item.title: E-scooter hire ditched in Hobart over safety and behavioural concerns
item.description: The hire service has been banned after more than 37 deaths nationwide already this decade.

item.title: Traffic fines issued by an AI-camera dismissed in WA
item.description: More than $1 million in fines were wiped out due to the AI-powered camera.

item.title: Moana Pasifika ‘tragedy’ inspires ex-Wallabies captain to consider NRL defection with PNG Chiefs
item.description: The 110-Test great is plotting a move ‘home’ for a cause close to his heart.

item.title: Health Minister Mark Butler reveals NDIS overhaul and how federal government will rein in growth
item.description: Mark Butler will target the scheme’s out-of-control growth while admitting Australians need ‘more ID to get into a licensed club than to be an NDIS provider’.

item.description: ‘We talked about avoiding other things but clearly I should have added this to the list!’

item.description: The actor has fronted a Melbourne court, charged over grabbing a security guard in a compromising spot.

item.description: Patrick Muldoon’s family said he was ‘suddenly taken from this Earth’ aged 57.

item.description: A remote town with fewer than 50 people is now at the centre of a growing push to boost Australia’s fuel supply.

item.description: Victor Wembanyama laid on the floor for around 30 seconds before attempting to stagger to his feet.

item.description: The plastic could protect everything from mobile phones to hospital surfaces.
